case_title: LUCIEN LIDJI VS. JOHN M WOOD

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY LIDJI, LUCIEN AS TO DEFENDANT WOOD, JOHN M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $00.00 - SERVED MAR-16-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WOOD, JOHN M
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2021 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF LUCIEN LIDJI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN M. WOOD IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF LEFT 2 EXHIBITS BEHIND DEFENDANT LEFT HIS FOLDER OF EXHIBITS IN THE GALLERY, THEREFORE PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIDJI, LUCIEN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIDJI, LUCIEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WOOD, JOHN M THE COURT SPOKE TO WITNESS "SAM" IN THE WHITE MERCEDES SUV IN ADDITION TO THE EVIDENCE THAT WAS PRESENTED IN COURT AT THE HEARING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
